indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space provides ample room for movement and comfort.

indicators.name: Natural light
indicators.rationale: The natural light coming through the windows can reduce eye strain and improve mood.

indicators.name: High ceiling
indicators.rationale: The high ceiling allows for better air circulation and reduces the feeling of claustrophobia.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for computer work due to its large open area, natural lighting, and high ceiling.
